73641.title: 40 Super 80s Pop Hits!
73641.description: Everybody wants to rule the 80s Super Pop Hits list - but who will claim the No.1 spot? Keep watching... and remember, the only way... is up!

73642.title: MTV's Sounds Of 1987!
73642.description: We're powering-up the time machine and going back to celebrate the first years of our MTV lives! This time we land in... 1987!

73643.title: Forever 80s
73643.description: Check out all of the best hits from one of the biggest decades in music!

73644.title: The Power Of 80s Love!
73644.description: The power of love is strong here at MTV which is why we've put all of the best 80s love songs together in one playlist!

73645.title: Electric 80s!
73645.description: Tune in as we play all of the biggest electronic hits from the 80s!

73646.title: Greatest 80s Rock: Play It Loud!
73646.description: Hard! Alternative! Heavy! Post-punk! Metal! Indie! Goth! Call it what you want, but turn up the volume as we delve into the decade's best rock tracks in all their incarnations, right here on MTV80s!

73647.title: ... So 80s!
73647.description: Get ready because we're bringing you nothing but classic hits and iconic anthems from the 80s!
